message:
feat(decision): add multi-objective kill set optimizer

Implements goal-oriented plan optimization selecting actions that achieve
resource targets with minimal expected loss. Includes greedy, DP-exact
(for small N), and local search algorithms. Respects safety constraints,
reports infeasible shortfalls, and generates alternative Pareto tradeoffs.

Closes process_triage-2pil

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
